analysis.consistency: Consistent with common fantasy race definitions. Data structure is simple and direct.
analysis.quality: High. Data points are clear and standard for a race entry.

mechanics.notes: Mechanically sound for a basic race profile. Speed is standard (25ft walk). Traits are relevant to the Dwarf archetype.

recommendations: Verify if the speed unit (e.g., feet/meter) is standardized elsewhere.
Ensure 'dwarven-resilience' maps correctly to defined system mechanics (e.g., advantage on poison saves).
